data.name: 煌星的勝利女神
data.detailed_description:
【王子與8名女神的世界之旅】

世界的力量之源「艾拉」與「歐柏」被企圖打破均衡的帝國奪走。
同時，神國亞希拉也遭到欲稱霸世界的帝國襲擊。
國家遭到毀滅的亞希拉王子，沃爾夫，在旅途中與８位女神相遇，
並踏上了阻止帝國野心的世界行旅。
與有著各種故事的女主角們培養感情的即時戰鬥RPG！



【充滿速度感、爽快感的戰鬥系統】

操作分為普通攻擊與特殊技能，充滿速度感的戰鬥系統。
除了操作主人公沃爾夫，還可切換成其他女主角。
活用各個職業的特性，用喜歡的角色進行攻略吧！

【與8人的女主角的羈絆與冒險——全員都有配音！】

・青梅竹馬的夥伴魔法師，艾蕾歐諾拉 (CV:水野七海)
・銀髮女騎士，嘉德蕾雅 (CV:柊奈々)
・好色的瞇瞇眼修女，辛蒂 (CV:御苑生メイ)
・黑肉野性叢林戰士，茱莉亞 (CV:手塚りょうこ)
・偽娘，克里斯 (CV:蒼依ハル)
・滿溢母性的大賢者，思琳 (CV:ももぞの薫)
・穿著乳牛比基尼的活潑大姊姊，敏迷 (CV:ヒマリ)
・欠教訓的淫魔，夏娃 (CV:杏子御津)

【豐富的H場景】

本作品無NTR要素，屬於開後宮的作品。
(也有主人公被硬上的場景)
也有使用玩具的play、多P、搾乳中出等等......一定有能夠直擊你性癖的角色！

【H場景範例】

*正式版將會以無碼演出

・與青梅竹馬魔法使在戶外避人耳目地野戰

・初嘗禁果的高傲女騎士被強迫乳交

・被性感比基尼大姊顏面騎乘的同時被野性大姊騎乘性交

・三位女主同時被插入、指交，直至同時高潮

【輕鬆遊玩的遊戲設計！】

・透過水晶快速旅行
・透過收集物品、開放設施等對隊伍的支援效果
・所有事件場景均可一輪收集完成。

【基本資訊】

・CG 32 張 (含差分共 224 張)
・預估遊玩時間：8~20小時

data.short_description: 國家遭到帝國毀滅的亞阿西拉王子，沃爾夫，在旅途中與８位女神相遇， 並踏上了阻止帝國野心的世界行旅。 與有著各種故事的女主角們培養感情的動作RPG！
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL support, VRAM 1 GB
  • 儲存空間: 1.6 GB 可用空間

data.name: Radiant Victorias
data.detailed_description:
【Embark on a journey with eight stunning Goddesses】

The Empire threw the world into chaos when it seized the Era and the Orb, two mighty artifacts of mythical origin. Its savage armies lay waste to your home, the Holy Kingdom Arcilla.
With his kingdom left in ruins, Wolf, the prince of Arcilla, is on a quest to team up with eight heroines from across the world and try to stop the Empire's ambitions.

Do battle, travel, and get intimate with all the heroines, each with their unique stories!



【 Exciting, quick, and varied combat systems】

Each of your companions has their combat style and attacks. Switch out and strategize with your favorite characters to make the most out of combat!

【Eight fully-voiced heroines to get intimate with, both in the field and in bed】

・Eleonora: A mage and Wolf's childhood friend. (CV: Mizuno Nanami)
・Cattleya: A tough female knight. (CV: Hiiragi Nana)
・Cindy: A gentle but lustful nun. (CV: Misonō Mei)
・Julia: A wild and powerful Amazon. (CV: Tezuka Ryoko)
・Chris: A cunning merchant who isn't what she seems. (CV: Aoi Haru)
・Celine: A powerful sage with a motherly air. (CV: Mozono Kaoru)
・Mimmi: An older sister-like girl in a cow-print bikini. (CV: Himari)
・Eve: A lewd genius that needs punishment. (CV: Anzu Mistsu)

【Lots of H-scenes】

Radiant Victorias has characters and fetishes for every taste! Sex toys, group sex, milking, femdom, creampies, and so much more!
Disclaimer: This game does not include any NTR elements.

【H-scene Samples】

*Mosaics will be removed from the game.

・ Discreetly having outdoor sex with your childhood friend.

・ Making a proud female knight, taste the forbidden fruit (of paizuri) for the first time.

・A sexy cowgirl rides your face while a wild Amazon rides your dick.

・Three goddesses penetrated and fingered to reach orgasm at the same time.

【Simple, intuitive gameplay systems】

・Travel efficiently through crystals.
・ Grant your team supporting buffs by collecting items and unlocking facilities, etc
・ All event scenes can be collected in a single round of gameplay.

【 Basic information】

・32 CGs (224 including variations.)
・Estimated play time: 8~20 hours

data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL support, VRAM 1 GB
  • Storage: 1.6 GB available space
